mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, cover_image, category, author, user_id, source, views, status, reject_reason, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_news WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_news ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_news WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_news WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_news (title, summary, content, cover_image, category, author, user_id, source, views, status, reject_reason, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{category}, #{author}, #{userId}, #{source}, 0, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_news SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_news SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
